[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000010100 2
1 0111100000 4
2 0010001100 3
3 1110001011 6
4 1001000101 4
5 1100111010 6
6 0110011100 5
7 0101010001 4

45 54 0111010110 6
56 65 0010000111 4
67 76 1111010010 6
70 07 1000110010 4

02 20 1110001011 6 match 3
13 31 1001000101 4 match 4
24 42 1100111010 6 match 5
35 53 0110011100 5 match 6
46 64 0101010001 4 match 7
57 75 1101010101 6
60 06 0111100000 4 match 1
71 17 0010001100 3 match 2
